name_cn:
Genuine Quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Model~Sheepskin Leather Chain Shoulder Bag, Suede + Metal Logo + Textured Chain
Light luxury and premium feel leaves a lasting impression! The actual leather is very comfortable and smooth, and the chain length is suitable for all seasons, also very textured, stylish and versatile!!️
Style: Fashionista style, easy to handle for any occasion
Capacity: Great for daily use
Model: 111273 Black Gold
Size: 24-15-5 (with original packaging)
